title: MWCC debug lookup
description: Search live MWCC/Wine compiler probe output, build-rule debug metadata, and generated local MWCC compiler-note indexes.
status_message: Live runner v1: MWCC version/build-rule evidence is generated locally by knowledge/tools/mwcc_debug/runners/probe_mwcc_compiler.py.
limitations: This runner smokes the local Wine/MWCC compiler path and build-rule metadata; full pcdump hooks are still a richer follow-up when that tooling is installed.
Compiler-note indexes remain supplemental and should be verified against local build or pcdump output for a specific target.
